summary: Stainless-steel smartwatch seated in white molded packaging with two visible scratches on the display glass: a long horizontal scratch across the middle and a shorter diagonal scratch on the upper-right quadrant of the screen.
scene_details: A silver smartwatch (metal band) is centered in a white foam/ cardboard tray. The watch face is off/black, making light surface scratches easily visible. The long scratch runs horizontally near the center of the display; a second, shorter diagonal scratch is visible toward the upper-right area of the display. No other damage is apparent on the bezel or packaging.

defects.label: horizontal scratch on screen
defects.evidence: Thin, bright line crossing the display horizontally across the screen center, clearly visible against the black display surface.

defects.label: diagonal scratch on screen
defects.evidence: Short, angled scratch in the upper-right quadrant of the display, visible as a lighter line against the dark screen.
